Perfect! All four changes have been successfully applied. Here's a summary of the updates made to `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/pr/duplicate_check_cmd.py`:
## Changes Completed
1. **Line 78**: Changed `"Plan {plan_number} not found."` → `"PR {plan_number} not found."` 2. **Line 98**: Changed `"Plan content is empty. Provide a non-empty plan."` → `"PR content is empty. Provide a non-empty PR."` 3. **Line 130**: Changed `"No existing open plans to compare against."` → `"No existing open PRs to compare against."` 4. **Line 132**: Changed `"Checking against {len(existing_plans)} open plan(s):"` → `"Checking against {len(existing_plans)} open PR(s):"`
All changes were made to user-facing output strings only. Variable names (like `plan_number`, `existing_plans`, `plan_data`), function names, class names, and internal comments remain unchanged as requested.
